analysis.reasoning: Core message: China’s 14th Five-Year Plan benefits not only China but the whole world by creating space for other countries to pursue peaceful development. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no critique of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes. The tweet portrays China’s development as enabling global peaceful development, highlighting mutual benefits and a cooperative, peace-promoting role. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is international impact, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Implicitly references a national plan but does not claim success or superiority; focus is on international benefits rather than domestic achievement. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
